decision.overall_reasoning: Multiple conflicting factors require human judgment: (1) Trip had no pre-approval — employee claims emergency with verbal after-the-fact approval but no documentation, (2) Flight receipt missing for $480 which exceeds $75 threshold requiring manager exception, (3) Lunch receipt amount does not match claimed amount — employee explains split bill but this cannot be verified automatically, (4) Dinner receipt missing for $42 which is in the $25-$75 declaration range. The emergency exception policy may apply but requires human verification of the circumstances.

expense_decisions.reason: Receipt missing; over $75 requires manager exception approval document
Within $200/night limit; receipt present and matching
Receipt missing; needs signed declaration ($25-$75 range)
Receipt amount mismatch; split bill explanation needs human verification
Within $100/day limit; receipt present and matching

Missing receipts for expenses over $75 require manager exception approval
